chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1426 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 11.12.2024 Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant AG Sindh along with Najaf Ali Janwri, Focal Peroson of Chief Municipal Officer, Municipal Committee, Kharipur/Respondent No.3. >>>>>..<<<<< At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has received the post-dated cheques in respect of the total amount outstanding against the respondents, therefore, under instructions, he does not press this petition, which is not opposed by learned AAG Sindh. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
